title: Error importing custom plugins due to undefined property
symptom: When importing a custom plugin, an error occurs stating 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'name')', rendering the plugin unusable.
applies_when: Using custom plugins in local development
not_this_if: Plugin is correctly defined with a category
root_cause: The error occurs because the code attempts to access the 'name' property of 'plugin.pluginCategory' without checking if 'plugin.pluginCategory' is defined. If the category is undefined, it leads to a runtime error.
fix_steps: Modify the code to check if 'plugin.pluginCategory' is defined before accessing 'name'.
Test the plugin import again to ensure it works without errors.
agent_instruction: Update the plugin code to include a check for 'plugin.pluginCategory' before accessing 'name'.
